---
title: "ConditionIndex"
output: html_document
---

# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for ConditionIndex data

``` {r BasicStats}

### Stats for ConditionIndex rates
# ConditionIndex by section
ConditionIndexStats <- ConditionIndex %>%
  mutate(CI = ((TissueDryWeight - TarePanWeight) / ShellDryWeight) * 100,
         AnalysisDate = as.Date(floor_date(TripDate, unit = "month")),
         Plot_Date = as.Date(AnalysisDate + 14)) %>%
  group_by(AnalysisDate, Plot_Date, Estuary, SectionName) %>% 
  summarise(ConditionIndexMean = mean(CI, na.rm = TRUE), 
            SD= sd(CI, na.rm = TRUE),
            Upper = ConditionIndexMean + SD)

# Median values
ConditionIndexStatsMedian <- ConditionIndexStats %>%
  filter(AnalysisDate < ReportStart) %>%
  group_by(SectionName) %>%
  summarise(ConditionIndexMedian = median(ConditionIndexMean, na.rm = TRUE),
            ConditionIndexMax = max(ConditionIndexMean, na.rm = TRUE))

```


``` {r ConditionIndex Figures}

### Function explanation
# generate_plot(df, 
#               x_variable, x_label, 
#               y_variable, y_label, y_SD, 
#               UseColor, UseFill, 
#               title)

# Stats for Condition Index by Year and Section
ConditionIndexStats_Section_fig <- generate_grouped_plot(ConditionIndexStats, 
                                                "Plot_Date", "Date", 
                                                "ConditionIndexMean", "Condition Index)", "SD", 
                                                "SectionName", "SectionName", 
                                                "AB Oyster ConditionIndex by Year and Section")
print(ConditionIndexStats_Section_fig)

```

``` {ConditionIndex Text}
### Placeholder for ConditionIndex text for report
```
This is text to output for ConditionIndex
